rationale: Both notes indicate strong topical overlap in deceptive/embedded online news advertising and consumer behavioral outcomes: the citing paper studies fake-news ad effects on visits/purchases, while the cited paper provides causal evidence on native ad clicks, recognition, and trustworthiness. The citing note also says it extends deceptive advertising research, making this cited JMR native-ad paper a plausible conceptual/empirical antecedent rather than an obvious incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
